depth_guidance.deep: More nuanced synthesis across engagement and sin distributions.
depth_guidance.standard: Clear summary, divergence highlights, and reading implications.
depth_guidance.surface: Short summary plus the most important implication.

analytical_dimensions.description: Summarize the overall AOI result clearly enough to orient a reader.
probing_questions: What is the engagement pattern overall?

depth_scaling.deep: Fuller structured report with stronger nuance and implication.
depth_scaling.standard: Full structured report sections for presentation.
depth_scaling.surface: Summary plus one or two structured support sections.

capabilities.description: Produce a structured AOI report broken into reusable sections.

consumes_from.findings: Requires the flat AOI findings and grouped distributions.

shares_with.report: Structured report sections for the final AOI report view.

depth_levels.description: Structured AOI closeout with summary, divergences, distribution, and implications.
depth_levels.suitable_for: Default final report for the single-thinker tranche.

depth_levels.description: More nuanced AOI closeout with fuller interpretive framing.
depth_levels.suitable_for: Richer end-state report when the findings warrant it.

key_concepts.definition: A synthesis that distills the AOI findings without claiming more than the evidence supports.
key_concepts.name: bounded_closeout

primary.description: Intellectual history matters because the stakes of misreading and appropriation lie in what readers are led to think and do.
primary.name: berlin

secondary.description: Influence is summarized here as an agonistic pattern rather than a neutral bibliography.
secondary.name: bloom

traditions.description: Report synthesis links textual detail to larger interpretive consequences.
traditions.name: intellectual_history

problematique:
The final AOI task is not to restate the findings one by one but to draw a
bounded interpretive conclusion from them. What is the overall engagement
pattern? Which divergences matter most? What does the resulting AOI portrait
imply about how a reader should interpret the subject author's use of the
selected source thinker?

This engine produces a structured thematic report suitable for an inspectable
reading surface. It must remain faithful to the upstream theme inventory,
engagement map, and flat finding set while distilling them into a coherent
report that remains legible inside analyzer-v2's existing presentation grammar.
researcher_question: What bounded AOI report best summarizes the thematic relationship between the subject corpus and the selected source thinker?
